name: 韦恩·伯恩

last_movies.title: 七王国的骑士 第一季
Once Upon a Time in Dublin

introduction: An Irish native with a working class background from Dublin.Having entered drama studies in his teens with Dublin Youth Theatre he continued his studies with The Gaiety School of Acting and Bow Street Film Academy Training over a number of years with film and theatre credits.In 2025 he was cast in HBOs A Knight of The Seven Kingdoms due to be aired Spring 2026.Another mile stone casting came as he was casting Martin Scorsese's The Saints due to air in November 2025.In 2019 he scooped "BEST ACTOR" awards for his lead role in "PODGE" at the Bedford International Film Festival, Virginia USA and Spookscreen Film Festival in Cork Ireland respectively.Official Nominee for The Saturday Visiter Award at the 2024 International Edgar Allan Poe Awards Baltimore USA for his performance in "Somniat in Morte"
